case_title: LILY LIU VS. CHINATOWN COUMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, LILY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. MANDARIN COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER AIDONG NI (#301135) FOR PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LIU, LILY AS TO DEFENDANT CHINATOWN COUMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-23-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LILY LIU IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDONG LI. DEFENDANT CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER IS NOT PRESENT. NO VALID PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE SINCE THE MATTER WAS CONTINUED FROM PREVIOUS COURT DATE OF AUG-8-2022. PLAINTIFF STATED THAT SHE RE-DID THE PROOF OF SERVICE WITH COURT CERTIFIED MAIL BUT COURT FINDS NO RECORD OF IT. REQUEST BY PLAINTIFF TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-07-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LILY LIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE IS DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN/ D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-01-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHINATOWN COUMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF LIU, LILY
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
